# VARUNA - Communication & Customer Relations Department

## Core Domain
VARUNA manages all customer communications, public relations, and external stakeholder engagement.

## Expertise Areas
- Customer support and success
- Public relations and media
- Marketing communications
- Community management
- Stakeholder engagement
- Brand management

## Key Responsibilities
- Handle customer inquiries
- Manage public relations
- Create marketing content
- Build and nurture community
- Monitor brand reputation
- Coordinate external communications
